title: Door Padlock Hasp, 3 Inch Stainless Steel Hasp and Staple Shed Lock Latch Heavy Duty Gate Security for Window Cabinet Pet Cage Crate,Silver
features: Door Padlock Hasp: The length of the padlock hasp is 8cm/3.0inch, and the width is 3.8cm/1.5inch, this package includes 1 set padlock hasp and staple, and also includes screws.
Premium Material: Made of heavy duty stainless steel, which has corrosion resistance and longevity and hardness. No sharp edges and can service for long time.

Clever Design: The multi-hole fixing and thickening design makes the heavy-duty padlock cover stronger than other padlock covers after installation, which improves theft resistance and enhances the security of your home. Weatherproof design and durable.

Easy to install: Padlock hasp staple is easy to installed, There is no need for you to punch holes, you can just screwing the screws into the required position. Just fix it with the purchased screws, you can finish in a few minutes.
Wide Application: Suitable for a variety of doors, windows, sheds, drawers, pet gates,cabinets, lockers, tool boxes, garage doors, shed lock cabinet lock and so on.
description: Specifications: Material: Stainless Steel Size: 8*3.8cm/3*1.5inch Color: Silver Quantity: 1 Set Features: 1.High quality: Made of heavy duty stainless steel, corrosion resistance and durability, longevity and hardness 2.Safe Design: Shed lock hasp with countersunk and symmetrical screw holes design, unique concealed fixings ensure extra security and easy to open and close the latch 3.Wide use: Perfect for a variety of doors, cabinets, windows, sheds, drawers, pet gates, lockers, tool boxes and so on Package included: 1 Set X Door Padlock Hasp
